name: MaxHome - Get Past Sold Customers for Neighbourhood Mailers

content.query:
SELECT
lds.BranchID
,cst.[CustomerID]
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,[LP_DateAdded]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 WHERE
 lds.Division = 'MXH'
 and lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 and lds.Sold = 'True'
 and lds.BranchID IN
 (
/*
'MXH-NOW'
,'MXH-NOB'
,'MXH-BRB'
,'MXH-BRW'
,'MXH-LFW'
,'MXH-LFB'
,'MXH-BMB'
,'MXH-BMW'
*/
'MXH-PLWIN'
,'MXH-PLB'
,'MXH-PCB'
 )
 order BY
lds.BranchID
, [LP_DateAdded]
